package.name: m_ahe_task_allocator
package.description: Task allocation node for AHE-MRTA. Computes the weighted cost matrix using AHE allocation weights, assigns tasks to robots, performs robot-level task sequence optimization (adaptive insertion heuristic), and publishes OptimizedTaskQueue to each robot. Also contains baseline allocator implementations: greedy_nearest, static_weighted, deadline_aware, and later BiG-MRTA, RoSTAM-EA, Consensus-DBTA (from comparison methods MD file, Phase 9).
